CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Shortlist** builds a private, personalized *"Picked for You"* row for every user on your Plex server, from that user's own watch history — visible only to them, never to anyone else.
It runs as a single Docker container with a web UI and a ~10-minute setup wizard. Optional AI curation (Claude / OpenAI / Gemini / local Ollama) picks the titles and explains each one with a "Because you watched X", or you can run it with no AI at all. It only ever recommends titles already in your library, and can optionally ask Radarr/Sonarr for the ones you're missing.
Requires Plex Media Server 1.43.2.10687+, Plex Pass on the admin account, and a free TMDB key.
*Shortlist is currently in public beta* — please report any issues on GitHub, they get fixed quickly. Support: https://github.com/stevezau/shortlist/issues
